mapper.select: SELECT t1.* FROM fund_info t1 WHERE (t1.is_custom = 0 OR t1.is_custom IS NULL) AND t1.deleted = 0 AND t1.data_time = ( SELECT MAX(data_time) FROM fund_info WHERE (is_custom = 0 OR is_custom IS NULL) AND deleted = 0 AND data_time IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY t1.calmar_rank LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM fund_info WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT id FROM ( SELECT id FROM fund_info WHERE (is_custom = 0 OR is_custom IS NULL) AND (is_holding = 0 OR is_holding IS NULL) ORDER BY data_time DESC LIMIT #{keepCount} ) tmp ) AND (is_custom = 0 OR is_custom IS NULL) AND (is_holding = 0 OR is_holding IS NULL)
